tools.name: createWorkflow
tools.description: Create a new workflow template with trigger type, task definitions, nudge rules, and stage gates.

tools.name: listWorkflowTemplates
tools.description: List workflow templates filtered by module, status, or trigger type.

tools.name: getWorkflowTemplate
tools.description: Get a single workflow template by ID with full task definitions, nudge rules, and stage gates.

tools.name: publishWorkflow
tools.description: Publish a draft workflow template, making it available for instantiation.

tools.name: archiveWorkflow
tools.description: Archive a workflow template so it can no longer be instantiated.

tools.name: instantiateWorkflow
tools.description: Create a workflow instance from a published template, triggered by an entity event.

tools.name: listActiveWorkflows
tools.description: List workflow instances with status, progress, and optional filters.

tools.name: getWorkflowStatus
tools.description: Get detailed workflow instance status including tasks, activity log, and nudge history.

tools.name: cancelWorkflow
tools.description: Cancel an active workflow instance with an optional reason.

tools.name: completeTask
tools.description: Mark a workflow task as completed by a specific user, with optional notes.

tools.name: blockTask
tools.description: Block a workflow task with a reason, preventing it from being completed.

tools.name: reassignTask
tools.description: Reassign a workflow task to a different user.

tools.name: listWorkflowTasks
tools.description: List workflow tasks filtered by instance, assignee, status, or due date.

tools.name: triggerNudge
tools.description: Send a nudge notification to a task assignee through a specified channel.

tools.name: listNudges
tools.description: List nudge notification records filtered by instance, task, or recipient.
